import base64, pathlib, zipfile, shutil, os, subprocess, sys, time
from google.colab import files
zip_b64 = ''''''
root = pathlib.Path('/content/Mira-clone')
zip_path = pathlib.Path('/content/Mira-clone-redownload-posix.zip')
zip_path.write_bytes(base64.b64decode(zip_b64))
shutil.rmtree(root, ignore_errors=True)
root.mkdir(parents=True, exist_ok=True)
with zipfile.ZipFile(zip_path) as zf:
    zf.extractall(root)
os.chdir(root)

import torch
print('torch', torch.__version__, 'cuda', torch.cuda.is_available(), torch.cuda.get_device_name(0) if torch.cuda.is_available() else 'CPU')
subprocess.run([sys.executable, '-m', 'pip', 'install', '-q', 'imageio', 'imageio-ffmpeg', 'pillow', 'tqdm'], check=True)

t0 = time.time()
data = 'data/toy_arena_128_20k.npz'
subprocess.run([sys.executable, 'scripts/generate_toy_arena_npz.py', '--out', data, '--steps', '20000', '--size', '128'], check=True)
print('data seconds', round(time.time() - t0, 1))

# Early checkpoint
t1 = time.time()
subprocess.run([sys.executable, 'scripts/train_next_frame.py', '--data', data, '--epochs', '4', '--batch-size', '16', '--max-samples', '4000', '--out-dir', 'runs/early'], check=True)
print('early train seconds', round(time.time() - t1, 1))

# Improved checkpoint
t2 = time.time()
subprocess.run([sys.executable, 'scripts/train_next_frame.py', '--data', data, '--epochs', '20', '--batch-size', '16', '--max-samples', '4000', '--out-dir', 'runs/improved'], check=True)
print('improved train seconds', round(time.time() - t2, 1))

out = 'runs/progress_4panel_30s.mp4'
t3 = time.time()
subprocess.run([sys.executable, 'scripts/make_progress_video.py', '--data', data, '--early', 'runs/early/best.pt', '--improved', 'runs/improved/best.pt', '--out', out, '--seconds', '30', '--fps', '12', '--scale', '3'], check=True)
print('render seconds', round(time.time() - t3, 1))
print('total seconds', round(time.time() - t0, 1))
print('DOWNLOAD_FILE=/content/Mira-clone/' + out, os.path.getsize(out))
files.download('/content/Mira-clone/' + out)
